helpful: Google Web Search to identify the deep 8-4 circuit split on F.R.Crim.P. Rule 29 sufficiency de novo/plain error preservation and to identify Tovar v. United States
CourtListener REST API via MCP to verify the pending status of the docket
gaps: Lack of a working ranged backend for the local fedcourts CLI query tool in this environment due to missing S3 credentials
notes: Google Web Search was critical in uncovering the specific, mature circuit split (8-4) on Rule 29 sufficiency challenges. The CourtListener REST API confirmed the docket details and pending status. The fedcourts CLI query failed because of a lack of S3 remote URL configuration in this local test context, which is expected.
